creator: Lars_Koeller@odie.physik2.uni-rostock.de
text:
The manpage  of  zgrep is  missing in /usr/share/man/man1  but  it is
   available in /usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/gzip.

Fix: 

Add zgrep.1 in the Line

	MAN1=   gzexe.1 gzip.1 zdiff.1 zforce.1 zmore.1 znew.1

	in the file

	/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/gzip/Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 
	man zgrep
